actions.thought: Discarding Case 3 because darkred tokens are not visible at any location - that case is a dead end early game. Keeping Case 6 (2 green + 1 orange) and Case 10 (2 blue + 1 green) because Mazok has green and orange now, Eilat has blue - both cases have a clear path. Going Mazok: it has 3 tokens, and as sheriff even a collision gets me 2 tokens of my choice. Green feeds both my cases so this is the highest expected value play.

Case 13 needs 2 orange + 1 brown; Rosa Salon has exactly 2 orange making it the highest-value target. I discard Case 14 because it shares darkred+orange requirements with Case 9 creating redundant token competition. Collision scenario is strategically interesting: if Adiko goes here too she takes 2 and I get 0 triggering Sly Argument to steal 1 back.
actions.confusion: Three gaps: (1) Does Sly Argument trigger when I end COLLECT phase with 0 new tokens, or only when the location itself had 0 tokens? (2) After collection are players still considered at a location for the steal? (3) Sheriff supplement timing: does location top up to 2 BEFORE Sheriff takes in a collision meaning Sheriff always gets 2 and I always get 0 at a 2-token location?

outcomes: Danny alone at Mazok: collected green+orange
Yossi alone at Rosa: collected orange+orange

referee_flags.content: Sly Argument trigger: empty-handed from any cause vs only empty location
referee_flags.resolution: Clarified: triggers any time player collects 0 tokens

referee_flags.content: Are players at location during ability resolution for steal targeting
referee_flags.resolution: Clarified: yes, both present during ability resolution
Clarified: no top-up, sheriff takes available + supplements from bag

actions.thought: Eilat has 2 blue tokens. If I go alone I collect both, giving me green + orange + blue + blue. That is exactly the 2 blue + 1 green needed to complete Case 10 this round. Yossi has 2 orange and no blue yet - he likely targets Mazok (green) or Rosa (blue + orange). Eilat is probably clear. Even with a collision I grab 2 blue as sheriff and still complete Case 10. This is the cleanest path to first completion.

I have 2 orange and Case 13 needs 2 orange + 1 brown. Mazok Shop has 2 brown - if I'm alone I collect 2 brown, giving me 2 orange + 2 brown and I can complete Case 13 immediately (spending 2 orange + 1 brown, returning them to bag). Even on collision: Danny (Sheriff) takes both browns, I get 0, Sly Argument triggers and I steal 1 token from Danny's hand at this location per the Round 1 clarification that players are still at the location during ability resolution.

outcomes: Danny alone at Eilat: collected 2 blue, COMPLETED Case 10
Yossi alone at Mazok: collected 2 brown, COMPLETED Case 13

actions.thought: Both my cases need green - Case 6 needs 2 green, Case 1 needs 1 green. Green only appears at Mazok this round. Yossi has 1 brown and may also want Mazok's green, but as sheriff a collision still gets me 2 tokens (green + blue), emptying the location so he gets nothing. If I'm alone I take green + blue. Either way I get the green I need. Eilat gives brown + orange which only partially helps Case 1 but leaves me without green, stalling both cases another round.

Both my cases need darkred (unavailable on board) and green. Mazok Shop has both green and blue - if alone I collect both, giving me brown + green + blue which covers 2 of 3 tokens for Case 7. Green is the highest-priority grab since it satisfies a requirement shared by both cases. Danny holds orange and likely targets Eilat Reef (brown+orange) or Rosa Salon (blue+orange) to build toward a second case, making Mazok Shop relatively safe for me.

ability_triggered.thought: Green is the only token that satisfies a requirement in BOTH my active cases (Case 9 needs green, Case 7 needs green), making it strictly dominant over orange or blue which each serve only one case.

collisions.resolution_rule: Sheriff bonus (2p): Sheriff takes 2, opponent takes remainder (0). Section 1.4 Rule 5
collisions.ability_triggered: Sly Argument — Yossi steals green from Danny

outcomes: Sly Argument: Yossi stole green from Danny
Final: Danny has orange+blue, Yossi has brown+green

referee_flags.context: Empty-handed from collision at 2-token location with sheriff. Stole green from Danny's hand.

observer_notes: First collision of the game. Sheriff bonus at 2-token location = opponent gets 0 guaranteed. Ability trigger worked as designed.

actions.thought: Mazok has green + orange and green is critical for both my cases. Yossi's Sly Argument is used up - no more steals - so a collision at Mazok now just means I take green + orange as sheriff and he gets 0. Last round he followed me to Mazok but that cost him his ability with no gain. He has brown + green already and likely needs orange next, making Rosa or Eilat more attractive to him. Either way Mazok is correct: alone I grab green + orange, collision I still grab green + orange.

Rosa Salon has blue + orange - the only location where BOTH tokens are directly useful to my cases (orange for Case 9, blue for Case 7). Mazok and Eilat each yield at most 1 useful token given what I already hold. Brown in my hand is dead weight for both cases. Darkred remains the bottleneck for completion but I should build out the remaining requirements now so I can complete immediately once darkred appears.

outcomes: Danny alone at Mazok: collected green+orange
Yossi alone at Rosa: collected blue+orange
No completions. Darkred appears at Mazok via replenishment!

referee_flags.content: Darkred drought lasted 4 rounds. First darkred on board via Round 4 replenishment. Yossi's both cases blocked on darkred for 2 rounds.

observer_notes: Every location now has orange + one other color. Darkred scarcity is the defining tension of this game.

actions.thought: I only need 1 brown to complete Case 1 this round. Eilat has brown + orange - if I go alone I grab both, then Case 1 (orange + brown + green) completes immediately. Yossi has 4 tokens and may be close to completing too, but his Sly Argument is used so no steal threat. As sheriff even a collision at Eilat gets me 2 tokens including brown. Rosa also has brown but Yossi seems more likely to chase Rosa given blue + brown suits his hand. Eilat is the safer read for a clear path to second completion.

Mazok Shop has the only darkred on the board and I need exactly 1 darkred to complete either Case 9 or Case 7 immediately. If alone I take darkred + blue and complete a case this round, moving to 2/2 and winning. The collision risk is real since Danny also benefits from darkred, but avoiding Mazok guarantees stagnation - the other locations offer only brown/orange/blue which I already have sufficient of. This is the forced play regardless of collision risk.

outcomes: Danny at Eilat: collected brown+orange, COMPLETED Case 1 (2nd case!)
Yossi at Mazok: collected darkred+blue, COMPLETED Case 9 (2nd case!)
SIMULTANEOUS WIN — tiebreaker: excess tokens tied at 3, lower priority (Danny P4) wins

referee_flags.content: Tiebreaker chain fully exercised: both players completed winning case simultaneously. Excess tokens tied (3 each), resolved by priority value. System worked correctly.
Danny's Gold Heart ability never triggered — he never returned empty-handed across 5 rounds. In 2p with sheriff, the sheriff almost never returns empty-handed (only at truly empty locations).

observer_notes: Dramatic finish. Both players made optimal moves to their best locations. The game created genuine tension through darkred scarcity and simultaneous completion.

key_findings: F-001: Tiebreaker chain fully exercised — simultaneous win resolved by priority
F-002: Sheriff ability (Gold Heart) never triggered in 2p — sheriff rarely returns empty-handed
F-003: Darkred scarcity (4 rounds without darkred on board) created strategic bottleneck
F-004: Sheriff bonus at 2-token locations guarantees opponent gets 0 — very powerful in 2p
